compiled_state.title: Replace python3 realpath and md5 in _ensure_initialized with bash-native; add DSO_TICKET_LEGACY gate
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Story
564c-e391 — ticket CLI dispatcher init runs without spawning Python processes

## What to Implement
Modify plugins/dso/scripts/ticket _ensure_initialized function:

1. Add DSO_TICKET_LEGACY early-exit guard at the top of _ensure_initialized:
```bash
if [[ "${DSO_TICKET_LEGACY:-}" == "1" ]]; then
    # Pre-refactor Python-backed path (preserved verbatim for rollback)
    tracker_dir=$(python3 -c "import os,sys; print(os.path.realpath(sys.argv[1]))" "$repo_root/.tickets-tracker" 2>/dev/null) || tracker_dir="$repo_root/.tickets-tracker"
    # ... rest of original python path through the sync logic ...
    return 0
fi
```

2. Replace python3 realpath call (line 67) with bash-native:
```bash
# Bash-native realpath (works on bash 3.2+ / macOS / Alpine)
if command -v realpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    tracker_dir=$(realpath "$repo_root/.tickets-tracker" 2>/dev/null) || tracker_dir="$repo_root/.tickets-tracker"
else
    tracker_dir=$(cd "$repo_root/.tickets-tracker" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P) || tracker_dir="$repo_root/.tickets-tracker"
fi
```

3. Replace python3 md5 call (line 69) with bash-native:
```bash
# Bash-native md5 truncated to 12 chars (byte-identical to Python's hashlib.md5)
if command -v md5sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _md5_12=$(printf '%s' "$tracker_dir" | md5sum | cut -c1-12)
else
    _md5_12=$(printf '%s' "$tracker_dir" | md5 | cut -c1-12)
fi
local sync_marker="/tmp/.ticket-sync-${_md5_12:-fallback}"
```

Note: Use printf '%s' (not echo -n) for portability across bash 3.2+ and Alpine.

## File
- Modify: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket (only _ensure_initialized function)

## Constraints
- Do NOT touch write_commit_event — that is story 29e5-0a74
- Do NOT modify ticket-lib.sh — that is a different story
- The DSO_TICKET_LEGACY block must be byte-identical to the current Python path for fidelity
- After this change, _ensure_initialized must pass test-ticket-sync-orphan-reset.sh and test-ticket-sync-preserves-local.sh unmodified

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] _ensure_initialized contains zero python3 invocations when DSO_TICKET_LEGACY is unset
  Verify: grep -n 'python3' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket | grep -A5 -B5 '_ensure_initialized' | grep -v 'DSO_TICKET_LEGACY' | grep -c 'python3'; [ $? -eq 1 ]
- [ ] DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 env var restores Python-backed path in _ensure_initialized
  Verify: grep -q 'DSO_TICKET_LEGACY' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket
- [ ] bash md5 uses printf not echo -n (portability)
  Verify: grep -q "printf '%s'" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket
- [ ] test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh passes (GREEN after this task)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh
- [ ] test-ticket-sync-orphan-reset.sh passes unmodified
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-sync-orphan-reset.sh
- [ ] test-ticket-sync-preserves-local.sh passes unmodified
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-sync-preserves-local.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (no Python changes, but lint must be clean)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py

comments.body: AC amendment: md5sum output format is '<hash>  -' (two spaces + dash). Use printf '%s' "$tracker_dir" | md5sum | awk '{print $1}' | cut -c1-12 (not just cut -c1-12 directly). On macOS use md5 -q (quiet mode outputs hash only). Verify: printf '%s' '/some/path' | md5sum | awk '{print $1}' | cut -c1-12 | wc -c returns 13 (12 chars + newline)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: AC amendment: realpath fallback order must be: (a) realpath "$path" 2>/dev/null, (b) (cd "$path" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P), (c) literal path fallback. The cd-based fallback only works for existing directories; the literal fallback matches Python's error-swallowing behavior. Add acceptance criterion verifying realpath handles symlinked .tickets-tracker correctly.
comments.author: Test
